problem id: 62464c5a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1)

examples:
  01111100 -> 11111000
  01110111 -> 11101110
  01100100 -> 11001000
  10001111 -> 00011110
  10110011 -> 01100110
  11010001 -> 10100010
  01111001 -> 11110010
  01000110 -> 10001100

query: 01011111
predicted answer: 10111110
